steps.t: Grámi Hornhelm has requested that you help craft a weapon. You should talk to Belg Thickshanks to proceed.
Belg Thickshanks has asked you to help craft a dagger in Hammerstead. You should use the forge to heat steel.
Belg Thickshanks has asked you to help craft a dagger in Hammerstead. You should talk to Belg Thickshanks.
Belg Thickshanks has asked you to help craft a dagger in Hammerstead. You should hammer the steel on the anvil to shape it.
Belg Thickshanks has asked you to help craft a dagger in Hammerstead. You should talk to Belg Thickshanks.
Belg Thickshanks has asked you to help craft a dagger in Hammerstead. You should hone the edge of the blade on the grindstone.
Belg Thickshanks has asked you to help craft a dagger in Hammerstead. You should talk to Belg Thickshanks.
Belg Thickshanks has asked you to help craft a dagger in Hammerstead. You should re-heat the blade in the forge.
Belg Thickshanks has asked you to help craft a dagger in Hammerstead. You should quench the red-hot blade in the water tank.
Belg Thickshanks has asked you to help craft a dagger in Hammerstead. You should talk to Belg Thickshanks.
Belg Thickshanks has asked you to help craft a dagger in Hammerstead. You should assemble the dagger at the assembly table.
Belg Thickshanks has asked you to help craft a dagger in Hammerstead. You should talk to Belg Thickshanks.
You should talk to Grámi Hornhelm, who can be found in Hammerstead.
